prompts.title: Box Breathing
prompts.message: Inhale 4s, hold 4s, exhale 4s, hold 4s. Repeat 3 times.

prompts.title: Neck Stretch
prompts.message: Slowly tilt your head to each side, holding 15 seconds per side.

prompts.title: 20-20-20 Eye Rest
prompts.message: Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.

prompts.title: Posture Check
prompts.message: Sit back, feet flat, shoulders relaxed, screen at eye level.

prompts.title: Shoulder Roll
prompts.message: Roll shoulders forward 5x, then backward 5x. Release tension.

prompts.title: Blink Reset
prompts.message: Close your eyes gently for 10 seconds. Blink rapidly 10 times.

prompts.title: Spine Stretch
prompts.message: Stand up, reach overhead, then slowly fold forward. Hold 15s.
